The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF BEST BUY STORES, L.P.'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. California has a liberal policy favoring the allowance of amendments to pleadings and any prejudice that defendant Underwriters may have suffered as a result of the granting of this motion has been eliminated by the recent continuance of the trial date. The new allegations all relate to the same underlying facts set forth in the initial complaint filed by Best Buy and obtained through discovery. Whether the allegations of a pre-tender payment constitute an involuntary payment is a question of fact not amenable for resolution on a motion to amend. (CACI 2322). The declaratory relief claim is permissible since it is based on past alleged acts of SupportSpace. Written order is signed and filed in open court.
